---
title: "Pengantar Metode Statistika Tugas 3"
author: "Sala Jalaludin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    theme: cosmo
---

# Input Data

```{r}
train <- read.csv("dataset_A.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
test <- read.csv("dataset_B.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r}
cat("Dimensi Dataset A:", dim(train), "\n")
cat("Dimensi Dataset B:", dim(test), "\n\n")
```
# Eksplorasi Data
```{r}
str(train)
summary(train)
```
```{r}
str(test)
summary(test)
```

# Preprocessing Data
```{r}
# handling missing value
# unknown menjadi NA
train[train == "unknown"] <- NA
test[test == "unknown"] <- NA

# Pencari modus
get_mode <- function(x) {
  x <- na.omit(x) # hapus NA sementara
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# Imputasi NA dengan modus di data Train
for(col in names(train)) {
  if(any(is.na(train[[col]]))) {
    train[[col]][is.na(train[[col]])] <- get_mode(train[[col]])
  }
}

# Imputasi NA dengan modus pada data Test
for(col in names(test)) {
  if(any(is.na(test[[col]]))) {
    test[[col]][is.na(test[[col]])] <- get_mode(test[[col]])
  }
}
```

```{r}
# feature engineering
# Membuat kolom baru 'is_contacted_before' (yes/no) berdasarkan nilai pdays 
train$is_contacted_before <- ifelse(train$pdays == 999, "no", "yes")
test$is_contacted_before <- ifelse(test$pdays == 999, "no", "yes")
```
```{r}
# feature selection & anti data leakage

# hapus 'duration'
train <- train[, !(names(train) %in% c("duration"))]
test <- test[, !(names(test) %in% c("duration"))]

# Hapus 'emp.var.rate' dan 'nr.employed' untuk mengurangi multikolinearitas
kolom_dihapus <- c("emp.var.rate", "nr.employed")
train <- train[, !(names(train) %in% kolom_dihapus)]
test <- test[, !(names(test) %in% kolom_dihapus)]

cat("\nVariabel tersisa setelah Feature Selection:\n")
print(names(train))
```

```{r}
# konversi tipe data
# Mengubah semua kolom bertipe character menjadi factor
train[sapply(train, is.character)] <- lapply(train[sapply(train, is.character)], as.factor) # nolint
test[sapply(test, is.character)] <- lapply(test[sapply(test, is.character)], as.factor) #nolint

# Menyamakan levels factor pada data Test dengan data Train
for(col in names(test)) {
  if(is.factor(test[[col]]) && col %in% names(train)) {
    levels(test[[col]]) <- levels(train[[col]])
  }
}
```

```{r}
# bagi data Train menjadi data Train dan data Validation
set.seed(123)
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(train$y, p = 0.8, list = FALSE) #nolint
data_train <- train[trainIndex, ]
data_val <- train[-trainIndex, ]

# handling class imbalance dengan downsampling
train_balanced <- downSample(x = data_train[, -which(names(data_train) == "y")],
                             y = data_train$y, 
                             yname = "y")
```

```{r}
# cek preprocessing
cat("\nData train_balanced\n")
cat("Jumlah baris dan kolom:\n")
print(dim(train_balanced))

cat("\nCek tipe data 'pdays' dan 'is_contacted_before':\n")
print(class(train_balanced$pdays))
print(class(train_balanced$is_contacted_before))

cat("\nProporsi Kelas Target (y):\n")
print(table(train_balanced$y))
```

```{r}
# Model development
library(caret) # evaluasi
library(randomForest) # random forest
library(e1071) # SVM
library(MLmetrics) # f1-score
library(nnet) # ANN
```

```{r}
# Scaling data numerik

# identifikasi numerik/integer
numeric_cols <- sapply(train_balanced, is.numeric)

# aturan scaling (Z-score: mean=0, sd=1)
scaler <- preProcess(train_balanced[, numeric_cols], method = c("center", "scale"))

# Menerapkan aturan scaling ke data Train, Validation, dan Test
train_balanced_scaled <- train_balanced
train_balanced_scaled[, numeric_cols] <- predict(scaler, train_balanced[, numeric_cols])

data_val_scaled <- data_val
data_val_scaled[, numeric_cols] <- predict(scaler, data_val[, numeric_cols])
```

```{r}
# Random Forest
set.seed(123)
model_rf <- randomForest(y ~ ., data = train_balanced_scaled, mtry = 2, ntree = 100, importance = TRUE)

# SVM
set.seed(123)
model_svm <- svm(y ~ ., data = train_balanced_scaled, kernel = "radial", probability = TRUE)

# ANN
set.seed(123)
model_ann <- nnet(y ~ ., data = train_balanced_scaled, size = 5, decay = 0.01, maxit = 300, trace = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# evaluasi model dasar

# Prediksi menggunakan data validasi yang sudah di-scale
pred_rf <- predict(model_rf, newdata = data_val_scaled)
pred_svm <- predict(model_svm, newdata = data_val_scaled)
pred_ann_raw <- predict(model_ann, newdata = data_val_scaled, type = "class")
pred_ann <- as.factor(pred_ann_raw)

# Evaluasi
cm_rf <- confusionMatrix(pred_rf, data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
cm_svm <- confusionMatrix(pred_svm, data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
cm_ann <- confusionMatrix(pred_ann, data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")

f1_rf <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_rf, y_true = data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
f1_svm <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_svm, y_true = data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
f1_ann <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_ann, y_true = data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")

cat("\n[ HASIL EVALUASI KOMPARATIF DASAR ]\n")
eval_results <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Random Forest", "SVM", "ANN"),
  Accuracy = c(cm_rf$overall['Accuracy'], cm_svm$overall['Accuracy'], cm_ann$overall['Accuracy']),
  Precision = c(cm_rf$byClass['Pos Pred Value'], cm_svm$byClass['Pos Pred Value'], cm_ann$byClass['Pos Pred Value']),
  Recall = c(cm_rf$byClass['Sensitivity'], cm_svm$byClass['Sensitivity'], cm_ann$byClass['Sensitivity']),
  F1_Score = c(f1_rf, f1_svm, f1_ann)
)
print(eval_results)
```

```{r}
# kalibrasi model
batas_probabilitas <- 0.67

# ANN KALIBRASI
prob_ann <- as.numeric(predict(model_ann, newdata = data_val_scaled, type = "raw"))
pred_ann_kalibrasi <- as.factor(ifelse(prob_ann > batas_probabilitas, "yes", "no"))
levels(pred_ann_kalibrasi) <- levels(data_val_scaled$y)

cm_ann_kalibrasi <- confusionMatrix(pred_ann_kalibrasi, data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
f1_ann_kalibrasi <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_ann_kalibrasi, y_true = data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")

# SVM KALIBRASI
pred_svm_raw <- predict(model_svm, newdata = data_val_scaled, probability = TRUE)
prob_svm <- attr(pred_svm_raw, "probabilities")[, "yes"]

pred_svm_kalibrasi <- as.factor(ifelse(prob_svm > batas_probabilitas, "yes", "no"))
levels(pred_svm_kalibrasi) <- levels(data_val_scaled$y)

cm_svm_kalibrasi <- confusionMatrix(pred_svm_kalibrasi, data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")
f1_svm_kalibrasi <- F1_Score(y_pred = pred_svm_kalibrasi, y_true = data_val_scaled$y, positive = "yes")

# Hasil
cat("\n[ HASIL F1-SCORE SEBELUM VS SESUDAH KALIBRASI (Threshold =", batas_probabilitas, ") ]\n")
cat("ANN - Sebelum :", f1_ann, " | Sesudah :", f1_ann_kalibrasi, "\n")
cat("SVM - Sebelum :", f1_svm, " | Sesudah :", f1_svm_kalibrasi, "\n")
```

```{r}
# ==========================================
# A. PERSIAPAN DATA TEST (SCALING)
# ==========================================
# Membuat salinan dari data test yang sudah dipreprocessing
test_scaled <- test

# Menerapkan aturan scaling (dari objek 'scaler' yang dibuat di tahap sebelumnya)
# ke kolom-kolom numerik pada Dataset B
test_scaled[, numeric_cols] <- predict(scaler, test[, numeric_cols])

cat("Data Dataset B berhasil di-scale!\n")


# ==========================================
# B. PREDIKSI DATASET B & EXPORT
# ==========================================
cat("\n=== MEMPREDIKSI DATASET B & EXPORT ===\n")

# Melakukan prediksi dengan model Random Forest
prediksi_final <- predict(model_rf, newdata = test_scaled)

# Membuat dataframe baru KHUSUS untuk submission sesuai format
# id: urutan dari 1 sampai jumlah baris data test
# y_pred: hasil tebakan (yes/no)
hasil_submission <- data.frame(
  id = seq_len(nrow(test_scaled)),
  y_pred = prediksi_final
)

# Menampilkan 5 baris pertama untuk memastikan formatnya sudah tepat
cat("\nPreview Format Data:\n")
print(head(hasil_submission, 5))

# Meng-export dataframe ke dalam format .csv
# quote = FALSE menghilangkan tanda kutip ganda pada output
write.csv(hasil_submission, "Hasil_Prediksi_Dataset_B.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

cat("\n[SELESAI] File telah berhasil disimpan dengan format 'id,y_pred'.\n")
```
